movies.title: Pathaan
movies.description: India's most wanted spy Pathaan takes on a vengeful mercenary who has unleashed a deadly biological weapon against the nation. A high-octane action thriller packed with jaw-dropping sequences across exotic global locations.

movies.title: Jawan
movies.description: A prison warden recruits a group of women to pull off a heist while simultaneously fighting a social injustice — setting the stage for a thrilling face-off between father and son.

movies.title: Animal
movies.description: A son's obsessive love for his father transforms into a destructive rage as he discovers the corporate conspiracies threatening his family. A visceral and unapologetic exploration of raw masculine emotion.

movies.title: Gadar 2
movies.description: Tara Singh crosses the border into Pakistan once again to rescue his son Charanjeet, fighting against an entire nation in a battle of love and courage.

movies.title: Dunki
movies.description: A group of friends dream of emigrating to England and take the illegal 'donkey' route through multiple countries. A heartfelt story of friendship, sacrifice, and the pursuit of a better life.

movies.title: Rocky Aur Rani Kii Prem Kahaani
movies.description: Rocky, a brash Punjabi businessman, and Rani, an intellectual journalist from a Bengali family, fall in love — only to navigate the complexities of family, culture, and tradition.

movies.title: OMG 2
movies.description: A man finds himself in a legal battle against the education system after his son is expelled from school for alleged misconduct. With divine intervention, he fights for sex education and truth.

cast.name: Akshay Kumar
cast.role: Kanti Sharan Mudgal / Messenger of Shiva

movies.title: Fighter
movies.description: India's first aerial action franchise follows the Air Force's Aerial Force One as they take on a dangerous enemy threatening national security. Spectacular aerial combat sequences.

movies.title: Crew
movies.description: Three air-hostesses get entangled in a gold smuggling operation run by a bankrupt airline, leading to a hilarious yet dangerous chain of events.

movies.title: Brahmastra: Part One – Shiva
movies.description: A young DJ named Shiva discovers he has a mysterious connection to fire and to a powerful ancient weapon, the Brahmastra, as dark forces threaten the world.

movies.title: Drishyam 2
movies.description: Seven years after the incident, Vijay Salgaonkar must once again outwit the police as the case is reopened. An even more gripping sequel to the original thriller.

movies.title: Dangal
movies.description: Mahavir Singh Phogat, a former wrestler, trains his daughters Geeta and Babita to become world-class wrestlers, defying societal norms in a heartwarming true story.

movies.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
movies.description: A man with an unwavering devotion to Hanuman helps a mute Pakistani girl return to her homeland in a journey that crosses the border between two nations at war.

movies.title: 3 Idiots
movies.description: Two friends search for their lost companion and reminisce about their unconventional college days at the Imperial College of Engineering, where he inspired them to pursue happiness.

movies.title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
movies.description: Three friends take a road trip across Spain, confronting their fears and rediscovering what truly matters in life. A breathtaking celebration of friendship, love, and living fully.

movies.title: PK
movies.description: An alien stranded on Earth loses his remote control device and must navigate religion, faith, and human society to find his way home.

movies.title: Andhadhun
movies.description: A pianist who pretends to be blind witnesses a murder and becomes entangled in an escalating web of deception, crime, and dark comedy.

movies.title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
movies.description: Based on the 2016 Indian Army surgical strikes across the LOC following the terrorist attack on an Indian Army base. A patriotic thriller with brilliant tactical precision.

movies.title: Queen
movies.description: A sheltered Delhi girl goes on her honeymoon solo after her fiancé calls off the wedding, embarking on a journey of self-discovery across Paris and Amsterdam.

movies.title: Dil Chahta Hai
movies.description: Three inseparable best friends navigate different stages of love and life after college, growing apart and finding themselves again. A timeless coming-of-age classic.

movies.title: KGF: Chapter 2
movies.description: Rocky has risen through the ranks and now controls the Kolar Gold Fields. But new enemies from both the government and the underworld threaten his reign in this epic sequel.

movies.title: RRR
movies.description: Two legendary Indian revolutionaries — Ram and Bheem — embark on a mission against British oppression and forge a friendship that becomes legendary in an epic action-drama.

movies.title: Vikram
movies.description: A black-ops agent investigates a series of masked killings, uncovering a vast underworld conspiracy involving powerful enemies in a relentlessly paced thriller.

movies.title: Kantara
movies.description: A conflict between a forest tribe and greedy landlords reaches a divine climax, blending mythology, folklore, and breathtaking action in this extraordinary Kannada film.

movies.title: Ponniyin Selvan: I
movies.description: Set in 10th century Tamil Nadu, the film follows the Chola empire's power struggle, intrigue, and romance with stunning production design and an ensemble cast.

movies.title: Maidaan
movies.description: The real story of Syed Abdul Rahim, the revolutionary coach who built the Indian national football team from scratch and led them to glory in the 1950s and 60s.

movies.title: Avengers: Endgame
movies.description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance to the universe in this epic MCU finale.

movies.title: The Dark Knight
movies.description: Batman faces his greatest psychological challenge — the Joker — in a brutal battle for Gotham City's soul. Widely regarded as one of the greatest superhero films ever made.

movies.title: Inception
movies.description: A skilled thief who enters people's dreams to steal secrets is given a chance to have his past wiped clean in exchange for an impossible task — planting an idea.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.description: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival as Earth becomes uninhabitable — a mind-bending journey through time and love.

movies.title: Top Gun: Maverick
movies.description: After thirty-plus years of service as a top naval aviator, Pete 'Maverick' Mitchell is on the edge of retirement — until he finds himself training TOP GUN graduates for a specialized dangerous mission.

movies.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
movies.description: Jake Sully lives with his new family on Pandora. When a familiar threat resurfaces, Jake must work with Neytiri and the army of the Na'vi in a spectacular underwater adventure.

movies.title: Oppenheimer
movies.description: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer, the American theoretical physicist who helped develop the first nuclear weapons during World War II as part of the Manhattan Project.

movies.title: Barbie
movies.description: Barbie suffers a crisis that leads her to question her perfect Barbieland existence. She and Ken venture to the real world, where the rules of Barbieland don't apply.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
movies.description: Miles Morales catapults across the multiverse where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence — but must choose between his mission and his family.
movies.director: Joaquim Dos Santos, Kemp Powers, Justin K. Thompson

movies.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
movies.description: Still reeling from the loss of Gamora, Peter Quill rallies his team to defend the universe, with a mission that, if not completed, could lead to the end of the Guardians.

movies.title: Dune: Part Two
movies.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against those who destroyed his family. He faces a choice between his love and the fate of the known universe.

movies.title: Fast X
movies.description: Dom Toretto and his family are targeted by the son of drug kingpin Hernan Reyes, who seeks revenge across the globe for his father's death.

movies.title: Mission: Impossible – Dead Reckoning
movies.description: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team embark on their most dangerous mission yet — to track down a terrifying new weapon before it falls into the wrong hands.

movies.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
movies.description: John Wick discovers a path to defeating the High Table — but before he can earn his freedom, he must face off against a new enemy with powerful alliances around the world.

movies.title: The Batman
movies.description: In his second year of fighting crime, Batman uncovers corruption in Gotham City that links to his own family while facing a killer who targets Gotham's elite with cryptic riddles.

movies.title: Black Panther: Wakanda Forever
movies.description: The people of Wakanda fight to protect their home from intervening world powers as Queen Ramonda, Shuri, and others forge a new path for the kingdom.

movies.title: Killers of the Flower Moon
movies.description: Members of the Osage Nation are murdered under mysterious circumstances in the 1920s, sparking a major investigation by the newly formed FBI.

movies.title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
movies.description: Doctor Strange teams with a mysterious teenager who can travel the multiverse to face the Scarlet Witch — a powerful adversary intent on taking what Strange can never have.

movies.title: Adipurush
movies.description: The epic saga of Raghava — a divine warrior who rescues his beloved Janaki from the demon king Lankesh. Based on the ancient Hindu epic Ramayana with grand visual effects.

movies.title: Stree 2
movies.description: The town of Chanderi faces a new supernatural terror as a headless ghost known as Sarkata begins snatching men. Stree must return to protect the ones she loves.

movies.title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
movies.description: Pushpa Raj continues to expand his red sandalwood smuggling empire while clashing against the officer who seeks to destroy him. More action, more swagger, more fire.

movies.title: Kalki 2898 AD
movies.description: A mythological sci-fi epic where Lord Vishnu's final avatar Kalki is destined to arrive in the year 2898 AD to protect humanity. A spectacular blend of Hindu mythology and futuristic vision.

movies.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
movies.description: Deadpool is recruited by the TVA and joins forces with a variant of Wolverine in a multiverse adventure that changes the MCU forever. R-rated chaos at its most entertaining.

movies.title: Inside Out 2
movies.description: Riley enters adolescence and new emotions — Anxiety, Ennui, Envy and Embarrassment — take control, forcing Joy and the original emotions to embark on a new adventure.

movies.title: Alien: Romulus
movies.description: A group of young space colonizers find themselves in a confrontation with the most terrifying life form in the universe while scavenging the ruins of an abandoned space station.

movies.title: Don 3
movies.description: Don returns — more dangerous, more elusive, and with an impossible score to settle. The international criminal mastermind takes on the world's most powerful crime syndicate.

movies.title: War 2
movies.description: Kabir is back — India's most lethal secret agent faces a new global threat in this adrenaline-charged sequel to the blockbuster action franchise.

movies.title: Devara: Part 1
movies.description: A fearless sea lord Devara rules through fear for decades, but when his son Vara must pick up the mantle, the past returns with deadly consequences.

movies.title: Singham Returns
movies.description: ACP Singham returns to take on a massive political conspiracy that threatens the nation, teaming up with Simmba and Sooryavanshi in the ultimate cop universe crossover.

movies.title: Tumbbad
movies.description: A mythological horror set in a cursed village, where a man's obsessive greed for an ancient treasure leads him into a terrifying encounter with a dark god.

movies.title: Jailer
movies.description: A retired jailer goes on a rampage after his son, an honest police officer, is framed and killed. Rajinikanth delivers a mass entertainer in vintage style.

movies.title: Premalu
movies.description: A charming romantic comedy about a young man who falls in love multiple times while studying engineering in Hyderabad, only to find his true match in an unexpected way.

movies.title: Baahubali 2: The Conclusion
movies.description: When Shiva learns his true heritage, he begins to seek answers. His story is told through a flashback — an epic tale of love, betrayal, and the legendary warrior Amarendra Baahubali.

movies.title: Rocketry: The Nambi Effect
movies.description: The extraordinary true story of ISRO scientist Nambi Narayanan, who was falsely accused of espionage and fought to clear his name while his contributions to India's space program were forgotten.

movies.title: The Conjuring
movies.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse. Based on the true case files of the Warrens.

movies.title: Titanic
movies.description: A seventeen-year-old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard the luxurious, ill-fated R.M.S. Titanic. An epic romance set against the most famous maritime disaster in history.

movies.title: Parasite
movies.description: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan. Winner of Best Picture at the Academy Awards.

movies.title: Spirited Away
movies.description: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts.

movies.title: Rang De Basanti
movies.description: A group of carefree college students are transformed when they play the roles of freedom fighters for a British filmmaker's documentary, leading them to take radical action against corruption.

movies.title: Super Deluxe
movies.description: Four intersecting stories involving a transgender woman, an unfaithful husband, a priest, and a group of teenagers collide in unexpected and mind-bending ways.

movies.title: Drishyam
movies.description: A man goes to extreme lengths to protect his family after they are involuntarily involved in a crime. The original Malayalam thriller that spawned remakes across India.

movies.title: Sita Ramam
movies.description: An orphaned soldier writes letters to a woman he has never met. Their love story unfolds across the India-Pakistan border in the 1960s, bridging war, politics, and religion.

movies.title: Joker
movies.description: In Gotham City, mentally troubled comedian Arthur Fleck is disregarded and mistreated by society. He then embarks on a downward spiral of revolution and bloody crime.

movies.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
movies.description: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.
